ChangeRequest.name: Deposit as Loan subtype or as direct subtype of Instrument?
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
<!-- The Jeans issue ;-) -->
### Overview
The entity type _Deposit_ is currently a subtype of _Loan_ in the LDM. From a reporting point of view, this works. However, as discussed in issue #462, and specifically in https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/issues/462#note_1524906 and https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/issues/462#note_1619577 and https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/issues/462#note_1651911 and https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/issues/462#note_1626129 there are two possible interpretations possible for Deposit.
### Questions:
1. Do we keep the current model structure for _Deposit_ as subtype of _Loan_? 2. Or do we move it as direct subtype to _Instrument_ as depicted in the picture below:
![462-ae-requirements-deposits-and-repurchase-agreements](/uploads/4139cede351ae169d0171e5193b5a7a6/462-ae-requirements-deposits-and-repurchase-agreements.png)
(please ignore the "new" labels, they are a left-over of the picture in issue #462)
Part of this picture is already implemented because of #462.
### Contact person
@Arjan.Bos
### Description of change request
- There is only one _Deposit_. IReF sees this the same way. - It is not a _Loan_, as is my interpretation of BSI Annex II part 2 liabilities table and ESA 5.117 - 5.119 "Distinction between transactions in loans and transactions in deposits" (See https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX%3A02013R0549-20150824) - It is a subtype directly of _Instrument_ - Transferable deposit includes current account - Overdraft (needed for AnaCredit) is a current account with a credit balance (ESA F.22 5.82) - This is derivable from the sign of the nominal amount of the - ~~Revolving credit (new entity type) is now called Revolving loan to match the BSI definition~~ `Revolving loan indicator` remains an existing attribute of both _Trade receivables_ and of _Other Loan_. - Cash leg for a repo links to _Deposit_. - Cash leg for a reverse repo links to _Reverse repurchase agreement loan_.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
- All entity types with _(excluding repuchase agreement)_ in the name. - ...
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
